title: Space Station captures, berths Cygnus XL ’S.S. Steven R. Nagel’ cargo spacecraft
content: The vehicle launched on a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station on Saturday, April 11, at 7:41 a.m. EDT (1141 UTC). Capture by the space station’s Canadarm2 is happened on Monday, April 13, at 12:19 pm CT (1:19 pm ET / 1719 UTC). <a class="mh-excerpt-more" href="https://spaceflightnow.com/2026/04/13/live-coverage-space-station-to-capture-berth-cygnus-xl-s-s-steven-r-nagel-cargo-spacecraft/" title="Space Station captures, berths Cygnus XL ’S.S.
